claimBoundary: garment promotion requirements only; not production, Quest, clinical, legal, or scoring readiness
purpose: Prevent a garment from being promoted as reusable unless it fits multiple Anny-generated body classes instead of only one Reom-like adult.

requiredArchetypes.description: Small pediatric body; validates neckline, sleeve scale, torso length, and non-adult proportions.
Average pediatric body; validates pediatric encounter clothing reuse.
Thin adult body; validates that shrinkwrap and clearance do not collapse or look baggy/slab-like.
Average adult body; baseline adult reuse case.
Overweight adult body; validates belly/chest/hip adaptation without clipping or stretched texture artifacts.
Tall adult body; validates vertical garment scaling and sleeve/hem placement.
Short adult body; validates that garment does not overrun hips/arms or distort proportions.

promotionRule: Every required archetype must have a source-backed fitted candidate, WebXR-only screenshot evidence, pass=true, and score >= requiredScore before shared-cache runtime reuse is allowed.
recommendedNextImplementation: Add body measurement extraction for each generated humanoid: height, shoulder width, chest/belly/hip bounds, arm length, and neck position.
Generate archetype fixture humanoids through the same Anny/Charmorph source path when available, otherwise block promotion instead of assuming compatibility.
Run garment-ingest-and-fit per archetype using the same semantic garment key and source license record.
Run screenshot scoring per archetype and feed the aggregate evidence into garment-promotion-gate.mjs via --archetype-evidence.
